headline: Emerson Electric (EMR) Valuation Check After Recent Short-Term Share Price Gains
summary: What Emerson Electric’s Recent Returns Tell You Emerson Electric (EMR) has drawn attention after a solid 1 day return of 6.0%, building on a 7 day gain of 7.8%. Over the past month, the stock is roughly flat, with a small 1.1% rise. See our latest analysis for Emerson Electric. The recent 1 day and 7 day share price gains come after a relatively muted 90 day share price return of a 0.8% decline and sit alongside a 1 year total shareholder return of 38.9%.
